label: FACIS DSP — Transfer Process
info:
FR-DSP-003 — Transfer Process. Owns the FSM, access-object provisioning,
and the five HTTP endpoints. All mutations route through `flow.set('transfers',
...)` and fire `dsp.persist.transfers` to checkpoint to /data/dsp-state/.

Endpoints:
  POST /dsp/transfers                 — create + auto-complete (REQUESTED→STARTED→COMPLETED)
  GET  /dsp/transfers/:id             — read TransferProcess
  GET  /dsp/transfers                 — list
  POST /dsp/transfers/:id/suspend     — STARTED→SUSPENDED only, else 400
  POST /dsp/transfers/:id/terminate   — REQUESTED|STARTED|SUSPENDED→TERMINATED, else 400

FSM matrix (transfer_store.py:25-32):
  REQUESTED  → STARTED, TERMINATED, ERROR
  STARTED    → COMPLETED, SUSPENDED, TERMINATED, ERROR
  SUSPENDED  → STARTED, TERMINATED
  COMPLETED, TERMINATED, ERROR — terminal

HMAC URL (transfer_store.py:147-163):
  message    = `GET:${path}:${windowFrom}:${windowTo}:${expiresAt}`
  expiresAt  = (now + ttl).isoformat() with µs precision and `+00:00` suffix
  token      = HMAC-SHA256(DSP_HMAC_SECRET utf8, message utf8) hex (lowercase)
  url        = `${DSP_DATA_API_BASE_URL}/api/data/${assetId}?from=${...}&to=${...}&expiresAt=${...}&sig=${token}`

Kafka access (transfer_store.py:165-182):
  topic    = `iot.dataset.${assetId}.tp-${transferId}` — Python emits the doubled tp-tp- prefix; preserved.
  bootstrap = env.DSP_KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP || 'kafka.provider.example:9092'
  sasl     = { mechanism:'SCRAM-SHA-256', username:`user_${transferId}`, password: token_urlsafe(24) }

name: create + auto-complete
read by id
list all
transition → SUSPENDED
transition → TERMINATED
